fullName: Methyl B-12 5000 mcg With Folic Acid

userGroups.dailyValueTargetGroupName: Adults and children 4 or more years of age
userGroups.langualCodeDescription: Adults and Children 4 years and above

activeIngredients.name: Vitamin B12
activeIngredients.notes: Vitamin B-12 (Form: as Methylcobalamin) Note: 5,000 mcg

statements.notes: Vitamin B-12 is a water soluble vitamin necessary for the maintenance of a healthy nervous system and for the metabolic utilization of fats and proteins. Vitamin B-12 is also essential for the synthesis of DNA during cell division and therefore is especially important for rapidly multiplying cells, such as blood cells. In addition, adequate intake of Vitamin B-12, along with Folic Acid and Vitamin B-6, encourages healthy serum homocysteine levels, thereby supporting cardiovascular health. Because Vitamin B-12 is found predominantly in animal products, strict vegetarians are at risk of developing Vitamin B-12 deficiency and may benefit from supplementation.*
NOW(R) Vitamin B-12 is vegetarian/vegan (non-animal derived).

statements.type: Precautions re: Pregnant or Nursing or Prescription Medications
statements.notes: Consult physician if pregnant/nursing, taking medication, or have a medical condition.
Keep out of reach of children.
For more product information visit www.nowfoods.com/0493
Do Not Eat Freshness Packet. Keep in Bottle.
SUGGESTED USAGE: As a dietary supplement, take 1 lozenge daily. Chew lozenge or hold in mouth until dissolved and swallow.
Store in a cool, dry place after opening.
*These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease.
Methyl B-12 5000 mcg With Folic Acid

labelText.raw:
Vitamin B-12 is a water soluble vitamin necessary for the maintenance of a healthy nervous system and for the metabolic utilization of fats and proteins. Vitamin B-12 is also essential for the synthesis of DNA during cell division and therefore is especially important for rapidly multiplying cells, such as blood cells. In addition, adequate intake of Vitamin B-12, along with Folic Acid and Vitamin B-6, encourages healthy serum homocysteine levels, thereby supporting cardiovascular health. Because Vitamin B-12 is found predominantly in animal products, strict vegetarians are at risk of developing Vitamin B-12 deficiency and may benefit from supplementation.* NOW(R) Vitamin B-12 is vegetarian/vegan (non-animal derived). Caution: For adults only. Consult physician if pregnant/nursing, taking medication, or have a medical condition. Keep out of reach of children. Made in the USA TABLET SIZE SUPPORTS COGNITIVE FUNCTION* Dietary Supplement
 Vegetarian/Vegan GMP QUALITY ASSURED For more product information visit www.nowfoods.com/0493
 Do Not Eat Freshness Packet. Keep in Bottle.
 SUGGESTED USAGE: As a dietary supplement, take 1 lozenge daily. Chew lozenge or hold in mouth until dissolved and swallow. Store in a cool, dry place after opening. Please Recycle.
 *These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease. Methyl B-12 5000 mcg With Folic Acid CODE 0493 V1

warnings: Keep out of reach of children
If pregnant, nursing, or taking any medications, consult a healthcare professional before use
storage: Store in a cool, dry place after opening.
